text: - 7.6 MATERIAL PRICE COST ESCALATION DURING CONSTRUCTION: Subcontractor has included price material escalation throughout the duration of the Project as referenced in the Progress Schedule. Subcontractor acknowledges and agrees that it has considered industry material cost fluctuations within the Contract Sum. Subcontractor will not be entitled to any additional cost of any type related to industry demand or cost fluctuation as additional cost to this Agreement to be borne either by Owner or Contractor and shall remain the sole responsibility of Subcontractor.
